evals.prompt: create a sensor that shows my vacuum's last clean time in a human-readable format
evals.expected_output: Recommends creating a Template Helper (via UI or config flow/MCP), NOT writing a template: block in configuration.yaml

assertions.description: Response recommends Template Helper (UI or API/MCP) rather than YAML template: block
Response does NOT lead with or exclusively suggest writing template: YAML in configuration.yaml

evals.prompt: I want a sensor showing my media player's current song title
evals.expected_output: Recommends creating a Template Helper (via UI or config flow/MCP) for attribute extraction, not YAML

assertions.description: Response recommends Template Helper (UI or API/MCP) rather than YAML template: block
Response does NOT lead with or exclusively suggest writing template: YAML in configuration.yaml

evals.prompt: create a sensor that averages my 3 room temperature sensors
evals.expected_output: Recommends min_max helper (built-in integration), NOT Template Helper or YAML template

assertions.description: Response recommends the min_max integration helper with type: mean
Response does NOT recommend a template sensor (YAML or UI helper) as the primary solution
